title: Add password history tracking and migration script for auth system
description: Extend the JWT-based auth system with password history (last 5 passwords), create a migration script to assign 'viewer' role to existing users without a role, and add comprehensive tests for all auth scenarios. Keep user-store.ts as backward compatibility fallback.
existing_patterns: src/auth/auth-service.ts - PBKDF2 password verification, token refresh rotation
src/auth/_auth.ts - RbacRole type admin/editor/viewer with ROLE_HIERARCHY
src/auth/withAuth.ts - HOC wrapper with role checking
src/auth/auth-service.test.ts - Mocked Payload + JWT service test pattern
